headline: AI and full-stack engineer at RAW Labs
title: AI Engineer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and RAW Labs company listings match the attendee name, role, company, and Greece/Athens context; The Org adds consistent work-history and education details but marks the profile unverified.
bioMarkdown: AI and full-stack engineer at RAW Labs, with a background spanning software engineering, data science, big data, and AI. Useful contact for conversations on practical AI systems, data-heavy applications, and production software engineering.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Alex Zerntev as AI Engineer and Full Stack Engineer at RAW Labs in Greece.

primary.label: RAW Labs LinkedIn company page
primary.note: Company page lists Alex Zerntev among RAW Labs employees and identifies RAW Labs as an IT services company.

secondary.label: The Org profile
secondary.note: Unverified profile with role, RAW Labs tenure, prior engineering roles, Athens context, and data science education details.

headline: COO and Chief Product Officer at Buoy
title: COO
confidenceNote: LinkedIn directory results match name, COO/CPO role, Buoy Software, New York, ex-Amazon, and AI-native healthcare operations; GoFractional provides consistent product and operations background.
bioMarkdown: COO and Chief Product Officer at Buoy, focused on AI-native healthcare operations. Product and operations leader with experience across consumer technology, automation, and generative AI applications.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Alexa Schwarz as COO and Chief Product Officer at Buoy Software, based in New York.

primary.label: Buoy Health LinkedIn company page
primary.note: Describes Buoy as a digital health company using AI technology for personalized clinical support and healthcare navigation.

secondary.label: GoFractional profile
secondary.note: Summarizes her fractional CPO/product leadership background, ex-Amazon experience, and interest in generative AI and omnichannel operations.

headline: Senior technology leader at SPS Commerce
title: Sr. Director of Engineering
confidenceNote: Name and SPS Commerce affiliation are well supported; public sources show Senior Director of Technology and prior Enterprise Architect rather than the exact supplied Sr. Director of Engineering title.
bioMarkdown: Senior technology leader at SPS Commerce with experience in enterprise architecture, software development leadership, and API/platform standards for retail supply-chain systems. Strong match for conversations on scalable engineering organizations and integration-heavy platforms.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Alexander Ivakhnenko as a strategic technology leader with SPS Commerce experience, including Enterprise Architect.

primary.label: SPS Commerce technology site
primary.note: Describes SPS Commerce engineering practices and its technology organization.

primary.label: SPS Commerce official site
primary.note: Identifies SPS Commerce as a retail EDI, sales, and item-data platform company.

secondary.label: The Org profile
secondary.note: Lists Alexander Ivakhnenko as Senior Director of Technology at SPS Commerce with prior enterprise architecture and software-development leadership roles.

secondary.label: SPSCommerce GitHub discussion
secondary.note: Shows public technical discussion participation by alexander-ivakhnenko on SPS API standards and sandbox/test-context architecture.

headline: Partner at Quiet Capital focused on AI, infrastructure, enterprise, and deeptech
title: Partner
confidenceNote: Personal site, Quiet Capital author bio, and LinkedIn all align on Quiet Capital partner/investor role and AI/deeptech focus; location varies between Menlo Park/San Francisco Bay Area sources.
bioMarkdown: Partner at Quiet Capital investing in early-stage AI, infrastructure, enterprise, and deeptech companies. Three-time founder and angel investor with prior company-building experience around Pathlight/Echo AI and SeatMe.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: States he invests in early-stage AI startups with Quiet Capital and is building in AI inference; mentions Echo AI and selected investments.

primary.label: Quiet Capital essay author bio
primary.note: Identifies Alex Kvamme as a Quiet partner focused on infrastructure, enterprise, and deeptech, with founder and angel-investor background.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Alexander Kvamme as Founder and Investor with experience at Quiet Capital and Duke education.

secondary.label: Forbes Technology Council profile
secondary.note: Legacy profile describing his Pathlight CEO role, SeatMe co-founder background, and startup investing/advising.

secondary.label: PitchBook investor profile
secondary.note: Lists Alexander Kvamme as an angel investor and Quiet Capital lead partner, with Pathlight CEO/co-founder background.

headline: AI and advanced analytics engineering leader at Moog
title: Chief Engineer AI
location: East Aurora, New York, United States
confidenceNote: Public evidence strongly links Alexandre/Alex Sluijter to Moog, AI, IoT, smart factories, and advanced analytics, but the exact current title Chief Engineer AI was not found in accessible primary sources.
bioMarkdown: AI and advanced analytics leader at Moog working around industrial AI, IoT, and smart-factory initiatives. Relevant for conversations on applying AI to manufacturing quality, aerospace/defense systems, and operational analytics.

primary.label: Moog AI manufacturing article
primary.note: Official Moog article describes use of artificial intelligence for advanced manufacturing quality inspection.

primary.label: Moog and Unibap AI collaboration
primary.note: Official Moog news item on AI processing technology for space and defense applications.

primary.label: Moog Hugging Face organization
primary.note: Moog Inc. organization page on Hugging Face lists Alexandre Sluijter as the visible team member.

secondary.label: LinkedIn post from Asian Institute of Management visit
secondary.note: Describes Alexandre Sluijter sharing how Moog uses AI and IoT in smart factories and data science at its Baguio factory.
